summary: SINGLE_FOCUS Axes (0..4 × -1..6). RED exact-solution curve y=x+1 for dy/dx=y−x (with the IC y(0)=1 making the exponential term vanish). Three Euler trajectories plotted as polylines with dots at grid points: BLUE h=0.5 (coarse, drifts), ORANGE h=0.2 (medium), GREEN h=0.05 (fine, tracks truth). Each uses VMobject set_points_as_corners from a manual Euler integration loop. YELLOW bottom caption conveys the pedagogical point: accumulating small tangent ticks traces the full ODE trajectory.
